title: 10 best herbal teas for edema
intro_desc: Herbal teas for edema are a natural remedy that helps to alleviate swelling and fluid retention in the body by reducing inflammation and improving circulation. The best herbal teas for edema include Urtica dioica, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Equisetum arvense, Astragalus membranaceus, Achillea millefolium, Verbascum thapsus, Taraxacum officinale, Plantago lanceolata, Silybum marianum, and Sambucus nigra. If left untreated, edema can lead to discomfort, mobility issues, and even organ damage, significantly impacting daily life, causing pain, limited mobility, and emotional distress.
